texto: If someone is sad, they put on a song, or if someone wants to rock out, and they want to get into a good mood, they put on music. Just being able to be a part of something like that I feel like was my ultimate push to do music.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Adam Hicks: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “If someone is sad, they put on a song, or if someone wants to rock out, and they want to get into…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, music, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e song.
